title: Slaughter
content:
Slaughter is the combination of Wang Lin's Slaughter and Absolute End Essences. He is an extremely powerful and terrifying being, able to combat Grand Empyrean's despite sacrificing Wang Lin's other Essences, his Heavenly Bull Armor and a significant part of his Cultivation to exist.

It was said that Slaughter reached the realm of Heaven Trampling before Wang Lin and was sent back in time using Flowing Time and the Dream Dao to find a way to resurrect Li Muwan after failing the first time.

At the end of the series, he decides to relinquish his free will and fuse back into Wang Lin so he could be with Li Muwan again.

Personality
[
]

He is extremely cold, vicious and utterly unfettered, and as such is usually suppressed by the Restriction and Absolute Beginning Essences.

Wang Lin used his Flowing Time spell to reverse time and send his Slaughter avatar countless years into the past. This avatar was tasked with imitating Wang Lin's life and using its dream dao to divinate and calculate events in Wang Lin's life, essentially acting with autonomy and freedom. This explains certain confusions about Wang Lin's "previous life," which was actually this Slaughter avatar sent back in time to alter events
